creator: root@dionysos.yi.org
text:
Makefile updated.  New version of TiK client has been made available
as well.  The Makefile has been cleaned up significantly with the addition of
the files/srcfiles file.  The directory structure also necessitated
significant changes be made to the Makefile.

Fix: 

Please update the port to reflect the changes.  Thank you.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
